cast: Dylan O'Brien, Hannah Gross, Emory Cohen, Keir Gilchrist, Maika Monroe

title: Sunshine
overview: A team of international astronauts is sent on a dangerous mission to reignite the dying Sun with a nuclear fission bomb in 2057.
cast: Cillian Murphy, Rose Byrne, Chris Evans, Michelle Yeoh, Cliff Curtis

title: La La Land
overview: When Sebastian, a pianist, and Mia, an actress, follow their passion and achieve success in their respective fields, they find themselves torn between their love for each other and their careers.
cast: Ryan Gosling, Emma Stone, John Legend, Rosemarie DeWitt, Finn Wittrock
